title: crepis conyzifolia subsp. conyzifolia
intro: Crepis conyzifolia subsp. conyzifolia, also known as Hawk's-beard or False Hawksbeard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Crepis conyzifolia subsp. conyzifolia include its use as a diuretic and its ability to stimulate digestion. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Crepis conyzifolia subsp. conyzifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
